subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh the truth before the faces of the world and summoneth them unto the Ancient King Who hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق امام وجوه العالم و یدعوهم الی مالک القدم الذی اتی من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for protection, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
